impact_scan.selection_reason: Small deterministic gprMax-style fixture with bundled B-scan and target ROI; suitable for reproducible smoke/normal evidence without large raw data.
impact_scan.manual_baseline_source: Reasonable experience parameters for gprMax impulse-like data: no zero-time crop by default, moderate dewow, model-frequency bandpass, trace-window background removal, and bounded energy-decay gain.

limitations: This baseline validates one small deterministic fixture first; it is not a global workflow optimum claim.
AutoTune uses heuristic search during selection; ground truth is used only for validation/reporting.
Manual baseline is an experience-based baseline, not a visual expert session with interactive retuning.
known_risks: Single-scene evidence may not generalize to field UAV-GPR data.
Heuristic QC can prefer visually cleaner images that are not geologically better.
Zero-time choices can invalidate later branch comparisons if early signal is removed.
